subcodes.first_line: O 'Āshūr! The Mount hath quaked within itself when it heard the Call of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, seized with rapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عاشور قد اهتز الطور فی نفسه بما سمع ندآء الله المهیمن القیوم اخذ جذب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
